notes: Profile editor upgrade: (1) TLS now has 'Auto' mode that probes TLS first then falls back to plain TCP — same UX as RedisInsight, no more 'TLS handshake failed' surprises. (2) Paste a redis:// or rediss:// connection URL at the top of the profile editor and every field auto-fills. (3) New 'Test Connection' button runs the real connect path + BullMQ queue scan against the form values without saving, so you can iterate on settings before committing.
